details.source: Captured from a real Codabench production run against the reference bundle under ground_truth/bundle/. The leaderboard's primary score is the test set (Set 2, 180 solutions); Set 1 (train, 90 solutions) is reported for diagnostic completeness only.
details.interpretation_note: geometric_mean_accuracy_metric returns 0 whenever any per-class accuracy is exactly 0. In sub_1's set2 result, one of the 9 sub-task accuracies is 0.0, so the geometric mean is 0 even though the other 8 sub-tasks score positively. The runner agent should consider any |actual - 0.0| <= 0.001 as a pass.
